name_en: Top-tier Replica [Exclusive Photo M11802 White] Crafted from soft perforated calfskin featuring Louis Vuitton's unique Monogram cutwork, this compact Iris wallet easily fits into any handbag. Opening the curved flap reveals a structured interior with card slots and a zip coin pocket. 12 x 9.5 x 3 cm (L x H x W) C
